trigger: China's factory activity expanded at a faster pace in January as export orders rebounded.

trigger: The Palestine Film Institute announces the first recipients of its new Palestine Film Fund.
description: The Palestine Film Institute has announced the first recipients of its new Palestine Film Fund following its launch at the Cannes Film Festival last year. The inaugural funding round has supported six feature-length films and three short films.

trigger: RZC Investments has paused all new investments while actively managing its current portfolio.

trigger: Bell claims Telus blocked it from launching internet in Western Canada due to issues with wholesale fibre service.
description: Bell says Telus failed to deliver “functional wholesale fibre service” in Western Canada in a new CRTC filing. Bell shared an abridged and partially redacted version of the filing detailing its issues with Telus.
